name: Scallion Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour and water.
2. Add a little more flour or a little cold water if the dough is not the right consistency.
3. Knead until smooth.
4. Let rest for 15 minutes.
5. Roll the dough into a cylinder.
6. Divide into 6 pieces.
7. Flatten each piece into a 4-inch circle.
8. Brush with softened fat and sprinkle with salt and scallions.
9. Roll each pancake into a long thin spiral and flatten it.
10. Fold this spiral into a square and flatten again.
11. Roll into a short, fat spiral and flatten to a 4-inch circle.
12. Heat about 3 tablespoons of oil in a pan.
13. Fry each piece until golden; flip once to cook both sides.
14. Add a teaspoon of oil if the oil is too depleted between pancakes.
